_workflow_info.title: Outpainting - Extend Canvas
_workflow_info.description: Extends the image canvas using ImagePadForOutpaint, then uses VAEEncodeForInpaint to fill the new area. The pad node creates a feathered mask automatically for smooth transitions.

_meta.title: Pad Image for Outpainting
_meta.notes: Extends canvas by specified pixels in each direction. New area filled with 0.5 gray. feathering creates a gradient transition at the original image edges. Returns IMAGE (padded) + MASK (1=new area, 0=original with feathered edge).
Encodes the padded image with the auto-generated mask from ImagePadForOutpaint. grow_mask_by ensures smooth latent-space blending.

inputs.text: a wide panoramic landscape, rolling hills, dramatic sky, highly detailed

_meta.notes: Outpainting typically needs high denoise (0.85-1.0) since new areas are essentially blank. Use more steps for better coherence.
